title: PPIP - Share data button presented after log out
scenario: Share Data toggle incorrectly reappears in Account settings after logging out of a Poly account
steps: Start app as guest, go through onboarding.
Choose to share or not share data.
Go to App Settings > General > Account — Share data toggle is shown with correct ON/OFF state.
Log in with Poly credentials — Share data toggle disappears (correct behavior).
Log out — Share data toggle reappears (incorrect; it should not be shown after logout).
expected: After logging out, the "Share Data" toggle should not be shown.
